WhyMAK.title: Why Melbourne chooses MAK
WhyMAK.subtitle: 5.0★ rated on Google. Trusted by homeowners and strata managers across Melbourne.
WhyMAK.feature1Body: We are certified Dulux Accredited painters — trusted to meet the highest industry standards for application and surface preparation.
WhyMAK.feature2Body: All MAK painters carry a current $20M public liability policy and valid police clearance. Your home is always in safe hands.
WhyMAK.feature3Body: We never skip prep. Every surface is washed, sanded, filled and primed before a single coat of paint is applied.

AboutPage.title: Melbourne painters who actually care
AboutPage.intro: MAK Painting Group is a Melbourne-based painting business led by Hossain, delivering premium interior, exterior, roof and commercial painting across the city. We built our 5-star reputation one job at a time — with honest advice, meticulous prep and finishes that last.
AboutPage.storyBody: What started as a passion for craftsmanship has grown into one of eastern Melbourne's most trusted painting teams. From our base in Ferntree Gully we serve homeowners, landlords, builders and businesses — always with the same promise: turn up on time, protect your property, and leave a finish you're proud of.
AboutPage.value1Body: We never skip the prep. Washing, filling, sanding and priming are included in every quote — it's what makes a finish last.
AboutPage.value2Body: Free, itemised, obligation-free quotes. No surprises, no hidden costs — just clear pricing you can plan around.
AboutPage.value3Body: $20M public liability cover and police-checked team members. Your home and family are in safe hands.
AboutPage.value4Body: Every job is covered by our 7-year workmanship warranty. If anything isn't right, we return and fix it free.
AboutPage.ctaBody: Get a free, no-obligation on-site quote from Melbourne's 5-star painters.
